  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AquaMaiden
    A terrain-dependent passive skill that dynamically alters a unit's attack power.
    ArmorShatter
    A global, flag-based passive skill that amplifies defense-reducing effects.
    AttackPlan
    A lightweight record representing a prepared combat action.
    AttackStrategy
    Defines the combat and targeting behavior for a unit on the game board.
    BagView
    Represents a horizontal UI container (a "bag" or roster) that displays a list of available units.
    BaseUnit
    Represents a base entity on the game board.
    Berserk
    A reactive passive skill that rewards the unit with stacking buffs whenever an allied defender falls in battle.
    BoardScene
    Represents the main gameplay scene where the actual board, units, and HUD are displayed.
    BreachingShot
    An offensive passive skill designed to dismantle enemy fortifications.
    BurnEffect
    Represents a specific lingering combat effect that applies continuous fire/burn damage to a unit over a set number of turns.
    Camera
    Represents a 2D camera viewport for a grid-based (likely isometric) game board.
    CharacterSelectionScene
    Represents the pre-game character selection screen.
    CloseAttack
    Implements a cardinal-direction melee combat strategy.
    CloseFireAttack
    An elemental variant of the melee strike that combines physical damage with fire magic.
    CombatEffect
    Represents a discrete, applyable effect that occurs during or after combat.
    Config
    A central configuration class that holds global constants for the game.
    CoordinateOutOfBoundException
    Thrown to indicate that a requested grid coordinate (row or column) falls outside the valid boundaries of the game board.
    DamageEffect
    Represents an instant combat effect that inflicts direct damage on a target unit.
    DeathRailway
    A strategic, one-time use passive skill that provides a massive mobility boost to the team's slowest units.
    DebuffAttack
    Implements a tactical debuff combat strategy that fires a projectile in a straight line.
    DefenseBuffEffect
    Represents a lingering combat effect that temporarily increases a unit's defense power.
    DefenseReductionEffect
    Represents a lingering combat effect that temporarily reduces a target unit's defense by a specified percentage.
    Describable
    A contract for game entities, items, or elements that possess a UI-friendly display name and a more detailed lore or mechanical description.
    EndTurnBtn
    Represents a custom-styled JavaFX Button used to end the current player's turn or phase.
    Enlightenment
    An offensive passive skill that empowers the unit against supernatural threats.
    FireResistance
    A defensive, flag-based passive skill that provides immunity to fire-based damage and status effects.
    Flammable
    A contract for game entities or environmental elements (such as tiles or units) that can interact with fire mechanics.
    FlyingMovement
    Implements flying-based movement logic.
    GameEndPanel
    Represents the game over overlay panel displayed when a battle concludes.
    GameManager
    Singleton controller managing the core game logic, flow, state, and interaction between the user interface and the underlying logic components.
    GameScene
    An abstract base class representing a distinct scene or state within the game (e.g., the Main Menu, Character Selection, or the Game Board).
    Grid
    Represents the main game board, managing the 2D spatial arrangement of Tiles and tracking all BaseUnits currently active in the game.
    GridFactory
    A specialized factory class responsible for constructing the game board's terrain.
    GridPoint
    Represents a specific coordinate point on the game grid.
    GridRegistry
    The central repository for game map layouts and environmental object placements.
    GridView
    Represents the visual container for the entire game board.
    GroundMovement
    Implements standard ground-based movement logic.
    HomeMadeCannon
    A high-risk, degrading passive skill representing unstable weaponry.
    ImageManager
    A utility class responsible for loading and caching JavaFX Image resources.
    InBagView
    Represents a visual UI component for a single unit displayed within the deployment "bag" or roster.
    InfoPanel
    Represents a thematic UI panel that displays detailed information about a selected entity.
    InstantEffect
    An abstract base class for combat effects that are applied immediately upon triggering.
    Kingslayer
    A highly specialized offensive passive skill designed to assassinate high-value targets.
    LeaderUnit
    Represents a specialized, high-value unit on the battlefield.
    LineAttack
    Implements a projectile-based combat strategy that travels in a straight line.
    LingeringEffect
    An abstract base class representing a combat effect that persists over multiple turns.
    LobbedAttack
    Implements a high-arc combat strategy that bypasses environmental obstacles.
    LobbedFireAttack
    An elemental artillery strategy that combines high-arc targeting with fire damage.
    LogPanel
    Represents a resizable UI panel that displays a real-time, scrolling text log of in-game events (such as attack outcomes, phase changes, and damage dealt).
    LongReach
    A distance-dependent offensive passive skill that rewards precise positioning.
    LoopMode
    Defines the playback looping behavior for background music (BGM) within the SoundManager.
    Main
    The entry point for the JavaFX application.
    MapSelectionScene
    Represents the pre-game menu scene where players select the battlefield map.
    MenuScene
    Represents the main menu scene of the game.
    MoveStrategy
    Defines the movement behavior for a unit on the game board utilizing the Strategy pattern.
    PassiveSkill
    Represents an automatic ability or trait possessed by a unit.
    PassiveType
    Defines the specific timing hooks and event triggers for passive skills.
    PointBlankAttack
    Implements a specialized projectile combat strategy that rewards close-quarters engagement.
    PurifyingAura
    A powerful supportive, Area of Effect (AoE) passive skill.
    PushAttack
    Implements a displacement-based melee combat strategy.
    PushEffect
    Represents an instant combat effect that forces a target unit to move away from the source unit.
    PushRadialAttack
    Implements a high-utility Area of Effect (AoE) combat strategy that combines damage and displacement.
    RadialAttack
    Implements an Area of Effect (AoE) combat strategy that emanates from the unit.
    Raze
    An aggressive offensive passive skill designed to quickly destroy key enemy structures.
    RoundPhase
    Represents the sequential phases that make up a single complete round of gameplay.
    SailingMovement
    Implements aquatic-only movement logic using the Strategy pattern.
    SoundManager
    A Singleton manager responsible for handling all audio playback in the game.
    StructuralRepair
    A supportive utility passive skill that repurposes the unit's attack action into a healing mechanic.
    SwarmAttack
    Implements a crowd-punishing Area of Effect (AoE) combat strategy.
    SwimmingMovement
    Implements versatile movement logic for units capable of both land and water traversal.
    Team
    Represents the faction of a unit, entity, or player within the game.
    Tile
    Represents a single discrete cell or coordinate space on the game board's grid.
    TileType
    Defines the various types of terrain available on the game board.
    TileView
    Represents the visual component of a single tile on the game board within the JavaFX scene.
    TurnAction
    Represents the current action mode or state of a selected unit during a player's turn.
    TurnPanel
    Represents a themed UI panel that displays the current progression of the game, specifically tracking the current round number and the active game phase (e.g., Deployment, Attacker, Defender).
    UnitFactory
    A concrete factory class responsible for instantiating units and placing them on the game grid.
    UnitRegistry
    The central repository and factory source for all unit types in the game.
    UnitRole
    Represents the hierarchical classification or rank of a unit within a team.
    UnitStats
    An immutable data container representing the base attributes and strategies of a unit.
    UnitView
    Represents the visual component of a game unit rendered on the isometric game board.
